negativeCapabilities.reason: Codex hook API is not publicly documented; the adapter uses a fallback chain over likely payload shapes but no integration has been verified end-to-end

compensatingRestrictions: Decision-engine treats Codex IR's trustMeta as conservative defaults (best-effort/unverified); floors must not assume exact args, exact cwd, or verified interception when sourcing from this adapter
Operators wiring Codex are expected to validate hook payload shape against codex/POSTTOOL_RESEARCH.md before enabling enforce mode (LILARA_ENFORCE=1)
Until pretool blocking is verified, treat Codex as observe-only and rely on out-of-band review for destructive actions
